prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约3527名、4073名、4796名、9908名、9827名；2024年因新高考选科改革位次大幅后移至9908名，2025年略回升至9827名，显 示改革冲击后已趋稳；该校在河北省物理类招生计划2021年39人、2022年41人、2023年40人、2024年41人、2025年43人；2026年计划44人，较2025年扩招 1人（+2.3%），扩招幅度较小，对位次后移作用有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 对外经济贸易大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第57名，近年排名略有下滑 ，属财经类顶尖院校；近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度排名第91位（评价为“一般”），短视频平台关注度中等偏低；应用经济学（A）、工商管理（A）、外国语言文学（A-），其中应用经济学与物理类招生的金融学类、金融工程、精算学、经济统计学等专业高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校位于北京，对河北考生具有天然的地域吸引力；本校在河北省招生占比约3.9%（2 025年数据），属中等偏上水平；金融/财经/经济类专业2026年社会热度为“分化观望”，数据科学、统计学等新工科方向热度升温；本省2026年普通高考总人数约60.98万，物理类考生数估算约36.9万，较202 5年（36.3万）小幅增加，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024年选科改革后位次已趋稳、2026年物理类扩招1人（+2.3%）、本省物理类考生小幅增加、财经类专业热度分化等因素 ，在2025年基准9827名基础上预计竞争略有加剧。预测最低位次约9984名，区间9484–10484名。

- 数据科学与大数据技术（大类招生，含数据科学与大数据技术、智能科学与技术、人工智能）。

- 统计学

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 3527, 4073, 4796, 9908, and 9827 respectively; in 2024, due to the new college entrance examination subject selection reform, the ranking significantly dropped to 9908, and in 2025 it slightly recovered to 9827, indicating stabilization after the reform impact; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province was 39 in 2021, 41 in 2022, 40 in 2023, 41 in 2024, and 43 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 44, an increase of 1 (+2.3%) compared to 2025, a relatively small expansion with limited effect on ranking decline.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: University of International Business and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked approximately 57th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a slight decline in recent years, belonging to the top-tier finance and economics institutions; its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity ranking is 91st (rated as 'average'), indicating moderately low attention on short video platforms; Applied Economics (A), Business Administration (A), Foreign Languages and Literature (A-), among which Applied Economics is highly related to Physics Category enrollment majors such as Finance, Financial Engineering, Actuarial Science, and Economic Statistics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university is located in Beijing, which has natural regional appeal for Hebei candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Hebei Province is about 3.9% (2025 data), at an upper-middle level; the social popularity of finance/economics/economy majors in 2026 is 'differentiated and wait-and-see', while new engineering directions such as data science and statistics are heating up; the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in the province in 2026 is about 609,800, with an estimated 369,000 Physics Category candidates, a slight increase from 2025 (363,000), leading to slightly intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the stabilization of rankings after the 2024 subject selection reform, a 1-person expansion (+2.3%) in Physics Category in 2026, a slight increase in Physics Category candidates in the province, and differentiated popularity of finance and economics majors, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 9827. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 9984, with a range of 9484 to 10484.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Law Category (including Law, Law (Big Data Dual Bachelor's Degree Program))
- Financial Engineering (Category Enrollment, including Financial Engineering, Financial Technology)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology (Category Enrollment, including Data Science and Big Data Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Finance Category (including Finance, Finance (International Finance and Markets), Economics and Finance, Investment, Insurance)
- Statistics
- Actuarial Science (Selected into Dual Bachelor's Degree Program or Experimental Class)
- Economic Statistics
- Economics Category (including International Economics and Trade, Public Finance, Taxation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Business Administration Category (including Accounting, Financial Management, Human Resource Management, Marketing, Business Administration)
- Financial Mathematics
- Data Science.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 9484 to 10484, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Finance Category, Statistics, Actuarial Science, Economic Statistics, Economics Category) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Law Category, Financial Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Business Administration Category, Financial Mathematics, Data Science) as a safety net. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<9484), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 610, 598, 805, 988, and 1075, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative shift of about 465 places over the past 4 years; the baseline for 2025 is about 1075; the university's enrollment plan in Hebei Province for History Category was 31 in 2021, 32 in 2022, 32 in 2023, 32 in 2024, and 34 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 36, an increase of 2 (+5.9%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that will push rankings backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: University of International Business and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked approximately 57th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a slight decline in recent years (47th in 2021 to 57th in 2026), belonging to the top-tier finance and economics institutions; its reputation has been stable recently, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity ranks 91st (rated as 'average'), with moderately low attention on short video platforms and no viral events; Applied Economics (A), Business Administration (A), and Foreign Languages and Literature (A-) are all A- or above, with Applied Economics and Business Administration being traditional strengths, highly corresponding to the enrollment majors of Finance, Economics, and Business Administration.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the social popularity of Finance/Economics/Economic majors is 'differentiated and wait-and-see', while Law is 'recommended'; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in this province is about 609,800, a slight increase from 2025 (about 606,800); the estimated number of History Category candidates is about 241,000, roughly the same as 2025 (243,700); the university is located in Beijing, which naturally attracts Hebei candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Hebei is about 3.9% (2025 data), at an upper-middle level, making Hebei one of its important source provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the expansion of 2 places (+5.9%) in History Category in 2026, a slight increase in the total number of candidates in the province, a slight decline in the university's Soft Science ranking, and the differentiation in popularity of finance and economics majors, competition is expected to ease slightly but rankings will still shift backward based on the 2025 baseline of 1075. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1128, with a range of 925–1331.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<925), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
